description_long: This is a female-presenting adult figure dressed in a layered, knee-length dress with puffed sleeves and a wide sash tied in a bow at the waist. The dress features a ruffled collar and a double-layered skirt, with a fitted bodice and decorative floral elements at the neckline. The figure wears a pair of heeled Mary Jane shoes and a bracelet on the left wrist. Her hair is styled long and wavy, with two prominent buns on top and loose curls cascading down the back. She also wears a headpiece with bear-like ears, adding a whimsical touch to her appearance. The overall look is reminiscent of a playful, fashion-forward street style often seen in urban or park settings.
description: A fashionably dressed adult woman in a layered dress with puffed sleeves, heeled shoes, and a whimsical headpiece with bear-like ears. Her long, wavy hair and detailed accessories create a playful, urban street style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the layered dress, sash bow, floral neckline, and headpiece with bear-like ears.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the dress, the sash bow, and the wavy hair cascading down the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the wavy hair, the back of the dress, and the heeled shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the dress, hair, and arm accessories.
attribute_clothing_type: layered knee-length dress with puffed sleeves, ruffled collar, wide sash bow, and decorative floral neckline
attribute_hairstyle: long wavy hair with two buns on top and loose curls
